The club competed in the [[2025 Super League season|2025 Super League]] and the [[2025 Challenge Cup]]. Castleford began the season under new head coach [[Danny McGuire]] before he was dismissed in July, with director of rugby [[Chris Chester (rugby league)|Chris Chester]] taking charge as caretaker. The team was captained initially by [[Sam Wood (rugby league, born 1997)|Sam Wood]], then by [[Alex Mellor]] from May. They finished the Super League season in 11th place. == Kits == '''Supplier:''' Oxen
